title: K12-KGraph: A Curriculum-Aligned Knowledge Graph for Benchmarking and Training Educational LLMs
innovation_summary: K12-KGraph: A Curriculum-Aligned Knowledge Graph for Benchmarking and Training Educational LLMs: We introduce K12-KGraph, a curriculum-aligned knowledge graph extracted from official People's Education Press textbooks in mathematics, physics, chemistry, and biology across primary, middle, and high school.
